permissions.fallback_msg: Agent Development needs to read files in the workspace (e.g., agent markdown files, reference docs, examples). Allow this read access?
Agent Development needs to create or modify agent files (e.g., agents/agent-name.md) in the workspace. Allow this write access?
Agent Development needs to run validation and test scripts (e.g., scripts/validate-agent.sh, scripts/test-agent-trigger.sh). Allow shell execution?
Agent Development needs to read version-controlled source files and reference materials within the plugin repository. Allow source code read access?
Agent Development needs to create or modify agent source files (e.g., agents/*.md) in the repository. Allow source code write access?

Agent Development needs to load external reference files and example content (e.g., references/system-prompt-design.md, examples/complete-agent-examples.md) into the agent session. Allow context loading?
Agent Development may spawn autonomous sub-agents to handle complex multi-step agent-creation or testing tasks. Allow sub-agent delegation?
Agent Development needs to load or dispatch authored skills within the Claude Code plugin runtime. Allow skill loading?
Agent Development needs to inspect available tools and their schemas to advise on agent tool configuration (e.g., Read, Write, Grep, Bash). Allow tool metadata access?
